body.title: D-inference-routing-fix-2026-05-03
body.text:
# Decision rollup — D-inference-routing-fix-2026-05-03

**Closed at:** 2026-05-04T22:45:44.699970+00:00
**Ticket count:** 7 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-incidental-get-logger-typo (S) — CLOSED: Fix _get_logger typo in inference_gateway.py:553 (latent NameError when _t4 is None)  `done` — 
- T-inference-misreport-fix (S) — CLOSED: Fix inference 'both unavailable' misreport + TIER6 diagnostic format bugs  `done` — Fixed 3 layered bugs in tier-6 fall-through: (1) user-facing message now distinguishes cloud-only/local-only/both-different/both-same-error/nothing-attempted; (2) diagnostic wraps cloud_attempted in b
- T-no-local-inference-timeouts (M) — CLOSED: Remove short timeouts from local inference paths  `done` — Removed sub-hour timeouts from 5 local-inference sites: IGOR_OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_SECS 90→7200, IGOR_OLLAMA_IMPULSE_TIMEOUT_SECS 15→3600, PREPARSE_TIMEOUT 8→3600, IGOR_LOCAL_PREPARSE_TIMEOUT_SEC 1.0→3600, c
- T-user-turn-cloud-first-routing (M) — CLOSED: Route user turns cloud-first (D254) — verified, contract locked by tests  `done` — VERIFIED, NOT REFACTORED: routing at inference_gateway.py:651 already implements D254 correctly via 'not is_user_turn' guard. 3 tests added to lock in the contract (test_user_turn_cloud_first.py). The
- T-is-user-turn-flag-coverage (M) — CLOSED: Trace + verify is_user_turn=True for human-Akien input reaching gateway.reason()  `done` — Audit complete: all call sites correct. Added DEBUG log at gateway.reason() entry + 4 tests documenting the audit table. Commit 3c5e6a64.
- T-mcp-igor-unreachable-from-cc (S) — CLOSED: CC cannot reach Igor MCP — channel_send connection reset  `done` — CC_SEND_URL in settings.local.json pointed at port 8080 (SSL) instead of 8082 (plain HTTP). One-line fix. cc_send confirmed working.
- T-sqlite-config-hunt (M) — DESIGNED: Track down the bare 'config' SQLite table caller (smoking gun of unfinished SQLite removal)  `done` — sqlite_caller_trace.py built + wired into main.py (gated IGOR_TRACE_SQLITE_CALLERS=1). Set the flag in .env, restart Igor, run a user turn, read ~/.TheIgors/local/logs/sqlite_caller_trace.log to find 

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
